query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod, u.subscriptionTier, u.subscriptionStatus, u.subscriptionEndsAt,
       s.id as serviceId, s.name as serviceName, s.description, s.targetCustomer
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'zapreviewer@mailinator.com'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute 
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod, u.subscriptionTier, u.subscriptionStatus, u.subscriptionEndsAt,
       s.id as serviceId, s.name as serviceName, s.description, s.targetCustomer
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'zapreviewer@mailinator.com'
LIMIT 5;

rows.name: Meta Reviewer
rows.description: A comprehensive coaching program that helps life coaches build a thriving practice with consistent 5-figure months through proven marketing systems and the Heart-Mind Activation Method.
rows.targetCustomer: life coaches who want to build a profitable practice
